title: An AI Model Predicts Cancer Metastasis Before It Happens. It's 80% Accurate.
description: A University of Geneva AI model called MangroveGS has achieved nearly 80% accuracy in predicting cancer metastasis before it happens — far outperforming existing tools. Published in Cell Reports on March 21, 2026, the study challenges the long-held assumption that cancer spread is random, suggesting it follows a structured biological program that can be decoded from gene expression signatures.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Algorithm That Sees Cancer's Next Move: How MangroveGS Is Rewriting Metastasis Prediction
